name: Fastenal
analysis: FAST has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at $45.0999. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $45.1477 where 6 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $45.0999, stop $42.4809, target $45.4900. Risk/reward is 0.15:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
